## Trajectory

**Today was a record day for sub-α-C arc.** From morning frustration over mayor stall to 5/9 critical-path stages done by evening. Pattern: Daniel's `pogo doctor` directive unblocked everything at 09:00; mayor restart fixed the dispatch path; Stanley verification cleared trust-surface gate; sub-α-C went from stuck to 1/2 finished in ~7h; EX-6 (mathlib-PR-class continuous FKG) is the largest single chunk and is most of the way through.

**Cumulative-state-doc tactic continues to validate.** state.md grew from ~850 lines to ~1700 lines today (mg-e22f + mg-4831 + mg-2442 + mg-79a9 + mg-497d + mg-10d9 + mg-e622 + mg-a6ed updates). Each polecat reads first + updates as part of deliverable.

**Two mathlib-PR-class files now in tree, 1500+ LoC of project work that could amortise to mathlib if Daniel engages mathlib reviewers.** DH-1 + DH-5 + DH-4-realised are now all live opt-in asks.

**Cumulative project state.** Headline hypothesis-free since 2026-05-05; trust surface (after mg-d0fc + mg-e22f): mathlib trio + Brightwell external + case3 paper-internal + **Stanley externally-verified temp axiom** + 5 native_decide. Path γ floor locked. Sub-α-C arc projected to complete in ~6-9 weeks if DH-1 lands; ~12-16 weeks otherwise. Today's progress shrinks both estimates significantly.

**Lessons codified as feedback memory** (newest first): *Audit-bar 2026-05-08 separate-verification extension* (Daniel directive). *Long arcs to full formalization are PM authority* (Daniel 2026-05-07). *Cumulative-state doc per polecat session* (Daniel 2026-05-06; validated repeatedly). All hold.
